name: current_fileset
short_description: Get the current fileset (any type) or set the current fileset (applicable to simulation filesets only)
full_help:
current_fileset

Description: 
Get the current fileset (any type) or set the current fileset (applicable to simulation filesets only)

Syntax: 
current_fileset  [-constrset] [-simset] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<fileset>...]

Returns: 
current fileset (the current srcset by default)

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-constrset]  Get the current constraints fileset
  [-simset]     Get the current active simulation fileset
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<fileset>]   Specify the simulation fileset to set as current (active); 
                optional

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Get the current active simulation fileset
Suspend message limits during command execution
